description: Approved admin and editor auth model for the generated admin panel. No secrets stored here.

notes: Admin panel authenticates via agent tokens issued from the Formaut Dashboard.
Tokens are scoped to site:write and/or site:deploy — never to writebacks:write.
No service-role keys or platform credentials are embedded in admin panel HTML or JS.
Update editor_model when a multi-editor or public auth capability is installed.
Do not store Supabase service-role keys in this file or in any generated HTML.
